title: The Unsolved Murder of JonBenét Ramsey

scenes.text: A child's death shrouded in mystery, whose truth remains hidden.
This tragedy occurred in Boulder, Colorado, in 1996.
JonBenét Ramsey was found dead in her home, sparking a national outcry.
The case remains unsolved, often revisited by the public and media alike.
Despite extensive investigations, the killer has never been identified.
Follow for a new cold case every day.

description: 📍 Boulder, Colorado, USA - 1996. JonBenét Ramsey was found dead in her home, her murder remains unsolved. Follow for daily cold cases!
